blocks.content: According to the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) 2025 report, Nepal's human development index is 0.622, ranking Nepal 145th among 193 countries in the world. Among these countries, Nepal last year was in 146th position, but this year it rose one place. In 1990, the human development index of Nepal was 0.398. During that period, the average life expectancy of Nepalis was 70.4 years. Similarly, according to the second periodic plan 80/81 of Lumbini Province, the human development index is 0.563, and the average life expectancy is 69.5 years. Poverty distribution details are included in the table below.
